---
title: "The Rt. Hon Gathorne Hardy, Viscount Cranbrook,"
---

## The Rt. Hon Gathorne Hardy, Viscount Cranbrook,

**Dates:** (1814-1906)

### Description

conservative politician

### Biography

He was created (1878) Viscount Cranbrook and (1892) 1st Earl of Cranbrook. [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from May 1st 1876

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
